name: PER_ALLOC_TASK_NOTIFS
description: PER_ALLOC_TASK_NOTIFS : This table has notifications for allocated task

columns.Name: ALLOC_TASK_NOTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key

columns.Name: PERFORMER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: PERFORMER_TEMPLATE_ID

columns.Name: OWNER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for owner on task assignment.

columns.Name: EXP_PERFORMER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for performer on task completion via expiry.

columns.Name: EXP_OWNER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for owner on task completion via expiry.

columns.Name: REJ_PERFORMER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for performer on task completion via rejection.

columns.Name: REJ_OWNER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for owner on task completion via rejection.

columns.Name: FCL_PERFORMER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for performer on task completion via force close.

columns.Name: FCL_OWNER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for owner on task completion via force close.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALLOCATED_TASKS.ALLOCATED_TASK_ID

columns.Name: TASK_NOTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_TASK_NOTIFICATIONS.TASK_NOTIFICATION_ID

columns.Name: TASK_EVENT
columns.Comments:
Event on the task
System Lookup: ORA_PER_TASK_EVENTS
ORA_TASK_ASSIGNED - Task assigned
ORA_TASK_COMPLETED - Task completed
ORA_TASK_EXPIRED - Task expired
ORA_TASK_CONTENT_UDPATED - Task details updated
ORA_TASK_DELETED - Task deleted

columns.Name: NOTIFY_PERFORMER
columns.Comments:
Notify the performer of the task when the task event happens on the task
System Lookup: YES_NO
Y - Yes
N - No

columns.Name: NOTIFY_OWNER
columns.Comments:
Notify the owner of the task when the task event happens on the task
System Lookup: YES_NO
Y - Yes
N - No

columns.Name: PERFORMER_CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: PERFORMER_CONTENT_TYPE

columns.Name: OWNER_CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: OWNER_CONTENT_TYPE

columns.Name: PERFORMER_CONTENT_DEFN_ID
columns.Comments: PERFORMER_CONTENT_DEFN_ID

columns.Name: OWNER_CONTENT_DEFN_ID
columns.Comments: OWNER_CONTENT_DEFN_ID

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SYNCH_HISTORY
columns.Comments: SYNCH_HISTORY
